description: Build and submit one iOS app to App Store

userStories.title: Trend research + idea selection
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: rank, idea, one_liner, platform, problem_statement, target_user, feasibility, overall_score, monetization_model, competition_notes, mvp_scope, next_step
At least 5 ideas evaluated, top 1 selected
userStories.notes: Zone2Daily selected (overall_score: 9.0). Zone 2 cardio HealthKit app. TikTok #zone2cardio 712K views. App Store gap: 226 reviews for closest competitor. Maffetone method (180-age). No AI API needed.

userStories.title: Product planning
acceptanceCriteria: Contains: target user, problem, solution, monetization, MVP scope
monetization section specifies subscription prices (monthly + annual)
curl itunes.apple.com/search for APP_NAME returns 0 exact name matches
userStories.notes: product-plan.md created. App: Zone2Daily. Bundle ID: com.aniccafactory.zone2daily. Price: $4.99/月, $29.99/年. MVP: Maffetone calculator + manual workout log + weekly dashboard (no HealthKit per PROHIBITED rule). iTunes: 0 exact matches for 'Zone2Daily' (verified 2026-03-09). 12 external sources. 7 sections.

userStories.title: Market research
userStories.notes: competitive-analysis.md: 6 competitors (3 direct + 3 indirect), 19 ✅/❌/⚠️ Matrix entries, 10+ sources. market-research.md: TAM $88M / SAM $9.8M / SOM Year1 $980 / Year3 $19.6K, POEM 20/25 (🟢 Strong Opportunity). Direct competitor Zone 2: HR Training only 226 reviews = big market gap. Negative signal: Zone 2 niche ceiling is low. iTunes API verified 2026-03-09.

userStories.title: Core Spec (PRD, ARCHITECTURE, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE)
acceptanceCriteria: docs/PRD.md exists and contains app_name, bundle_id, subscription prices
docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md exists and references RevenueCat SDK (not Mock)
userStories.notes: docs/PRD.md: 240 lines, 14 sections, 8 Feature IDs, $4.99/$29.99 prices, bundle_id com.aniccafactory.zone2daily, all Rules reflected (17/20/20b/21). docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: 358 lines, MVVM+SwiftData, RevenueCat only (no RC-UI), no tracking SDKs. docs/IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md: 553 lines, Purchases.shared.purchase(package:) referenced, no Mock in production code. All Rule 17/20/20b/21 violations = 0 across all docs.

userStories.title: UX Spec (UX_SPEC, DESIGN_SYSTEM, TEST_SPEC, RELEASE_SPEC)
userStories.notes: docs/UX_SPEC.md (294行): 9セクション, 27 accessibilityIdentifier, PaywallView+Maybe Later, SCR-001〜009. docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (185行): 7セクション, 24 color tokens (#FFF系), SF Symbols. docs/TEST_SPEC.md (229行): 7セクション, 35 unit tests, 10 integration tests, 6 Maestro flows. docs/RELEASE_SPEC.md (207行): 11セクション, en-US+ja メタデータ完全収録. Rule 17/20/20b/21 全ドキュメント横断違反=0. 合計: 7ファイル 2247行 (AC26 PASS).

userStories.title: Spec Review (all 7 documents)
acceptanceCriteria: code-quality-reviewer agent (.claude/agents/) — NOT codex-review skill, NOT Codex CLI run on all 7 docs
userStories.notes: code-quality-reviewer agent 実行。CRITICAL=0 → PASS。HIGH 6件 + MEDIUM 7件を修正: H-002(btn_subscribe/btn_maybe_later統一), H-003(input_age_settings/btn_upgrade統一), H-004(Privacy Policy URL統一→anicca-products), H-005(Colors.swiftトークン名DESIGN_SYSTEM準拠), H-006(Greenlight Rule20チェック修正), M-001(startOfWeek→dateInterval), M-005(#if DEBUGでlogLevel分岐), M-006(ローカライズキー統一), M-007(ディレクトリ名小文字統一)。修正ファイル: IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE.md, TEST_SPEC.md, RELEASE_SPEC.md。

userStories.title: Privacy Policy + ASC app creation
acceptanceCriteria: privacy-policy.md exists and deployed to GitHub Pages
App created in ASC (APP_ID recorded in .env)
userStories.notes: APP_ID=6760271560。Privacy Policy URL: https://aniccaai.com/privacy（既存URL使用、カスタムホスティング不要 per ref Step 1）。PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy + ITSApp: US-006でiOSプロジェクト作成後に追加（ref Step 2/3 明示的にスキップ）。asc web apps create（irisセッション）でASCアプリ作成成功。App Privacy: DATA_NOT_COLLECTED published=true。Bundle: com.aniccafactory.zone2daily。~/.config/mobileapp-builder/projects/zone2daily/.envにAPP_ID保存。

userStories.title: IAP + pricing + RevenueCat setup
acceptanceCriteria: asc subscriptions groups list --app $APP_ID returns 1+ groups
asc subscriptions list --group $GROUP_ID returns monthly + annual products
asc subscriptions prices list --id $MONTHLY_ID returns 175 prices
SPM dependency on RevenueCat added (RevenueCatUI prohibited -- Rule 20)
userStories.notes: GROUP_ID=21968001。3プラン作成: WEEKLY_ID=6760273120($1.99), MONTHLY_ID=6760273065($4.99), ANNUAL_ID=6760273121($29.99)。全37言語ローカリゼーション完了。175テリトリー availability + pricing 設定完了(weekly:174+USA, monthly:174+USA, annual:174+USA)。RC: project=proj8f8e55dc, app=app6ce1e68b1b, 3 products + 1 offering(default) + 1 entitlement(premium)。RC_IOS_PUBLIC_KEY=appl_PyWBfWiUnXVPIGciQLoMPcsYZkT。SPM + Typecheck はUS-006aで実施(ref Step 7.6)。

userStories.title: TDD Data Layer (xcconfig, Protocol DI, Models, Services)
acceptanceCriteria: xcconfig for API Key management (not hardcoded)
userStories.notes: zone2dailyios/ 作成。xcodegen + RevenueCat SPM 5.61.0。xcconfig Debug/Release でRC_API_KEY管理（gitignore済み）。SubscriptionService: Protocol DI + isConfigured guard実装。Zone2Calculator(Maffetone), NotificationService, WorkoutSession/UserProfile SwiftData Models完成。Tests: 32/32 PASS。Greenlight CRITICAL=0。BUILD SUCCEEDED。

userStories.title: TDD Onboarding + Monetization (MVVM, Onboarding, PaywallView)
acceptanceCriteria: Onboarding flow complete (includes notification permission step)

userStories.title: TDD Polish (DESIGN_SYSTEM tokens, a11y IDs, Localization)
acceptanceCriteria: DESIGN_SYSTEM tokens applied to all Views

userStories.title: Code Review (006a-d full review)
acceptanceCriteria: code-quality-reviewer agent (.claude/agents/) — NOT codex-review skill, NOT Codex CLI run on all 006 code
No Mock/Stub in production code (grep -rw 'class Mock' excludes Tests/)

userStories.title: Testing (Maestro E2E)
acceptanceCriteria: 6+ Maestro E2E flows in maestro/ (onboarding, timer, settings, payment-monthly, payment-annual, payment-failure)
All flows use id: selectors (no point: selectors)

userStories.title: Screenshots (capture + upload + review screenshot)
acceptanceCriteria: Screenshots captured via AXe + asc screenshots capture (en-US 4+ + ja 4+)
Screenshots uploaded to ASC for en-US and ja (>=4 each)
Subscription review screenshots uploaded for Monthly + Annual

userStories.title: ASC metadata sync (en-US + ja)
acceptanceCriteria: Metadata synced to ASC via asc-metadata-sync (en-US + ja)
Privacy Policy URL set for en-US AND ja

userStories.title: ASC compliance (age rating + encryption + rights + availability + pricing + review details)
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing set using subscription price-point IDs

acceptanceCriteria: Slack #metrics notified: need App Privacy setup

acceptanceCriteria: Report + product page screenshots posted to X via Postiz API
